tupe_applies.description: Whether TUPE applies. If true and above threshold, must be referred to Cabinet before proceeding. Source: CONTRACT-RULES Rules 4.3, 4.4.

social_value_assessed.description: Whether social value assessment completed. Required for above-threshold service contracts. Source: CONTRACT-RULES Rule 4.2.8, Public Services (Social Value) Act 2012.

conflicts_assessment_completed.description: Whether conflicts of interest assessment completed before tender notice publication. Source: CONTRACT-RULES Rule 7.3.

lots_considered.description: Whether lot structure considered to reduce SME barriers. Must be documented. Source: CONTRACT-RULES Rule 12.1.

existing_framework_checked.description: Whether existing frameworks checked before proceeding with standalone procurement. Source: CONTRACT-RULES Rule 4.2.7.

direct_award_justification_reference.description: Reference to Direct Award Justification Report. Required where route is direct_award. Kept by Director of One Legal. Source: CONTRACT-RULES Rule 5.4.

waiver_reference.description: Reference to approved waiver record. Kept by Director of One Legal with copy to Procurement Adviser. Source: CONTRACT-RULES Rule 6.4.

notices.description: Notices published during this procurement. Each references the notice_types taxonomy (UK1-UK17).

stages_completed.description: Procurement lifecycle stages completed. References procurement_lifecycle_stages S1-S8.

contract_id.description: Cross-reference to contract_record.contract_id on award. Null until award completed.

cabinet_member_decision_reference.description: Cabinet Member decision record reference. Required for tier 5 (£250k-£500k). Source: PART3E Table 4, Appendix A.

cabinet_decision_reference.description: Cabinet minute reference. Required for tier 6 (above £500k). Source: PART3E Table 4, ART12 KD4.

compliance_confirmed_items.description: Affirmative audit record — items confirmed as compliant. Populated in validate_case PASS and WARNINGS responses alongside any flags. Ensures a PASS response contains an explicit audit trail, not just silence. Each item: { check_id, description, evidence_reference, source }

items.evidence_reference: string — the reference value that satisfied the check

lifecycle_flow.description: Canonical flow from need to contract. Each arrow is a stage gate.
flow: S5_complete [above threshold] -> standstill_period (8 working days from UK6)
lifecycle_flow.key_decision_gate: Where forward_plan_required is true: Forward Plan entry must exist before S3_tender_publication. Without it the officer lacks authority to proceed under PART3E 3E.11.

validate_case_output_shape.description: Expected output shape for validate_case tool. PASS responses must include affirmative audit summary — not just absence of flags.

overall_status.logic: FAIL if any HIGH risk flags triggered. WARNINGS if medium flags or missing assessments only. PASS if no flags and all required checks confirmed.

triggered_flags.description: Risk flags that fired. Each: flag_id, label, description, source, recommended_action.

missing_assessments.description: Required assessments not yet completed. Each: check, required_when, source.

compliance_confirmed.description: REQUIRED even on PASS — affirmative list of checks satisfied with evidence references. See compliance_confirmed_items schema.

constitutional_conflicts_relevant.description: Known constitutional conflicts relevant to this procurement. See ISS-003.

validate_case_conflict_logic.description: Logic for determining which constitutional conflicts to surface in validate_case output.

rules.reason: C3 is the Forward Plan / officer authority compliance question that applies to all tier 4 contracts. Must be surfaced in validate output regardless of whether R11 fires.
C4 is the lex specialis resolution of Cabinet Member tender acceptance authority. Relevant to all tier 5 contracts.
C1 is the execution threshold conflict between Article 13 and Contract Rule 18. Relevant when contract execution is being determined.

schema_incomplete_flags.description: Fields marked as incomplete that affect decisioning or automation. These must be resolved before the schema is used operationally. Items here are removed from rule-bearing nodes to avoid poisoning automation.

flags.issue: De minimis threshold for below-threshold standing orders not confirmed from GCC financial regulations
flags.impact: Tier 1 lower bound is assumed 0 — if a de minimis exists, tier 1 ceiling may differ
flags.resolution: Obtain GCC Financial Regulations and confirm de minimis threshold

flags.issue: Publication platform for contract register not confirmed
flags.impact: Transparency compliance cannot be fully verified
flags.resolution: Confirm whether GCC publishes on council website, Contracts Finder, or both

flags.issue: Current post-holder for Procurement Adviser not named
flags.impact: Informational only — does not affect decisioning

flags.issue: PCR2015 rules (Appendix 1 of Contract Rules) not yet populated in source document
flags.impact: Pre-24 February 2025 contracts not covered by schema

schema_incomplete_flags.schema_status_note: schema_status remains 'draft' until all I-flags resolved and C3 compliance question addressed

derived_fields.description: Fields that can be computed from other schema values. Named here to stabilise the contract with future tooling even before computation is implemented. All derivations are rule-based and traceable to constitutional or legislative sources.

procurement_tier.logic: first tier in decision_authority_matrix where min_value_gbp <= value_estimated_gbp <= (max_value_gbp or infinity)

requires_forward_plan.logic: procurement_tier >= 4 OR any KD1/KD2 trigger assessed as true

required_notices.code_format_note: Above-threshold notices use UK-prefix codes (UK1-UK17) per PA2023. Below-threshold notices use BT-prefix codes per GCC Contract Rules and Local Government Transparency Code 2015. These are distinct code spaces.

requires_deed.logic: value_estimated_gbp > 50000 (subject to Council Solicitor discretion to sign instead)

requires_bond_or_pcg.logic: contract_type == 'works' AND value_estimated_gbp > 1000000 (unless s151 Officer determines inappropriate)
